news.title: Sam Altman’s project World looks to scale its human verification empire. First stop: Tinder.
news.summary: World, which has raised eyebrows (but also a lot of interest) with its Orb-centered anonymous verification project, is looking to expand its influence via a bevy of new partnerships.

news.title: Kevin Weil and Bill Peebles exit OpenAI as company continues to shed ‘side quests’
news.summary: Kevin Weil and Bill Peebles are leaving OpenAI as the company shuts down Sora and folds its science team, signaling a sharp pivot away from consumer moonshots toward enterprise AI.

news.title: Sources: Cursor in talks to raise $2B+ at $50B valuation as enterprise growth surges
news.summary: Returning backers a16z and Thrive are expected to lead the round.

news.title: ‘Tokenmaxxing’ is making developers less productive than they think
news.summary: There's a lot more code — but it's a lot more expensive and requires a lot more rewriting.
